artifacts.summary: Root cause: inject_section creates empty OPENCODE.md when file missing, no mechanism to include core content. Fix: create global OPENCODE.md in nvim config so sync can restore it.

AGENTS.md (not OPENCODE.md) is the standard OpenCode project instructions file. Plan should use AGENTS.md to match official conventions.
